overall.description: A cinematic third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The journey traverses elevated walkways, covered corridors, open plazas, and street levels, showcasing the game's detailed cyberpunk urban environment with reflective wet surfaces and vibrant neon signage.

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated walkway with glass railings overlooking the neon city skyline

horizontal magenta neon light strip running along the building edge
dense cluster of towering skyscrapers with illuminated windows and holographic displays
elevated monorail or transit track structure silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The sequence opens on an elevated pedestrian walkway with transparent glass railings overlooking a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape. Neon pink light strips illuminate the right side while futuristic skyscrapers dominate the horizon under an overcast night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with concrete walls

events.description: enters covered walkway from open elevated platform, transitioning from exposed to sheltered environment

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered corridor with concrete walls and overhead beams, following a character with red hair and gold vest

notable_agents.action: character with red hair and reflective gold vest walking ahead through the corridor

entered.detail: concrete ceiling with exposed beams providing overhead cover
smooth concrete wall with vertical architectural details
wall with grid-patterned windows showing interior lighting

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered pedestrian corridor with concrete walls and an overhead ceiling, transitioning from the open sky to a sheltered environment. The city skyline remains visible through openings on the right while the character walks ahead through the dimly lit passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with food vendors and neon signage

events.description: exits covered corridor into open plaza with illuminated food stalls and palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking through an open plaza area passing by food carts and neon billboards, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing at illuminated cart with large umbrella serving customers

entered.detail: illuminated food vending cart with large traditional umbrella and warm lighting
large vertical billboard with bright neon advertisement featuring human figures
tropical palm tree silhouetted against the city lights

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered corridor, the scene opens into a spacious plaza with tiled flooring and scattered palm trees. A brightly lit food cart with an umbrella occupies the center while neon billboards cast colorful reflections on the wet ground, and pedestrians move through the area.

events.description: begins descending concrete stairs from plaza level to street level
reaches street level with visible traffic and neon shopfronts under overpass

agents.ego_description: walking down concrete stairs from elevated plaza to street level, passing pedestrians on the walkway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright green jacket walking along the street level sidewalk

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings descending to lower level
transparent glass panel railing along the stair edge
multi-lane street with wet asphalt reflecting neon lights
futuristic cars with headlights on moving along the street

segments.scene_description: The character descends a concrete stairwell from the plaza to street level, transitioning from open sky to an enclosed underpass environment. Upon reaching the bottom, the scene reveals a street-level walkway with moving traffic and neon-lit shopfronts visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered street-level walkway under transit overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along street-level walkway under an overpass, passing vending machines and shopfronts with neon displays

notable_agents.action: pedestrian interacting with red vending machine booth on the sidewalk

entered.detail: bright red automated vending machine booth with illuminated display
storefront windows with pink and purple neon lighting

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered street-level walkway beneath a transit overpass, the environment features a prominent red vending machine booth and neon-lit shop windows. The road with moving traffic runs parallel on the right while pedestrians occupy the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with glass floor sections

events.description: ascends back to elevated walkway with transparent glass flooring overlooking traffic
turns left along the elevated walkway railing to follow the path

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated walkway with glass floor sections, observing the city traffic and neon skyline below

entered.detail: transparent glass panels in the walkway floor showing the street level below
metal safety railing with horizontal bars along the walkway edge
dense collection of illuminated advertisements and corporate logos on building facades

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions back to an elevated walkway featuring transparent glass floor sections that reveal the traffic below. The camera moves along the railing with panoramic views of the neon-lit cityscape, passing palm trees and overlooking the multi-lane street with moderate traffic flow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from an elevated cityscape into the dense street-level urban core before ascending once more to a panoramic vantage point. It begins on an elevated pedestrian walkway with transparent railings and pink neon strips, moving forward as the open sky is replaced by the concrete walls of a sheltered corridor. The scene then opens into a spacious, wet plaza filled with palm trees and glowing food carts before the camera descends a concrete stairwell into a dim underpass. As the character reaches street level, the environment shifts to a covered walkway beneath a transit overpass, passing a red vending machine and neon shopfronts alongside flowing traffic. Finally, the camera rises back to an elevated walkway with glass floor sections, gliding past palm trees to reveal a wide, neon-lit vista of the sprawling city.
